name: accounting firms processing 10–20 expense submissions/week tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 expense submissions/week, delayed approvals cause cash flow gaps. We send weekly approval reminders instead of manual tracking and email reminders.
problem_solved: Delayed expense approvals causing cash flow gaps.
